Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Providian National Bank
Alan Steinberg, Judgment Debtor appeared in Propria Persona

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted, except for $85 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
